allow: Bash(start "" cmd /k "cd backend && python -m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; routes=[r[''''path''''] for r in json.load\(sys.stdin\).get\(''''paths'''',{}\).keys\(\)] if False else print\(''''\\n''''.join\(json.load\(sys.stdin\).get\(''''paths'''',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.CommandLine -like '*uvicorn*'} | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 1; netstat -ano | findstr ':8000'")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 24608 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id 19236 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id 19600 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'killed'")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/chat/stream -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""message"": ""which quarter had the highest total spending?""}" --max-time 60 -N)

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$pids = \(netstat -ano | findstr ':8000' | Select-String 'LISTENING' | ForEach-Object { \\$_.ToString\(\).Trim\(\).Split\(\)[-1] } | Select-Object -Unique\)
foreach \(\\$p in \\$pids\) { try { Stop-Process -Id \\$p -Force; Write-Host \\"Killed \\$p\\" } catch {} }
Start-Sleep -Seconds 2
netstat -ano | findstr ':8000'
")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 24608 -Force -ErrorAction Ignore; Stop-Process -Id 13832 -Force -ErrorAction Ignore; Stop-Process -Id 25492 -Force -ErrorAction Ignore; Start-Sleep 2; \(netstat -ano | Select-String ':8000.*LISTEN'\).Count")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Id 24608 | Select-Object Id, Name, MainWindowTitle, StartTime")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Id 24608 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,Name; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) | Select-Object LocalPort,State,OwningProcess")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$ownerPid = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess
Write-Host 'Owner PID:' \\$ownerPid
Get-Process -Id \\$ownerPid -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, Name, Path
")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/chat/stream -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""message"": ""which quarter had the highest total spending?""}" --max-time 90 -N)
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/chat -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""message"": ""how many orders in Q3 2014?""}")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''reply length:'''', len\(d.get\(''''reply'''',''''''''\)\)\); print\(''''confidence:'''', d.get\(''''confidence''''\)\); print\(''''suggestions:'''', d.get\(''''suggestions''''\)\); print\(''''chart type:'''', d.get\(''''chart'''',{}\).get\(''''type''''\) if d.get\(''''chart''''\) else None\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""message"": ""top 5 suppliers by total spend""}" --max-time 90)
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""message"": ""top 5 suppliers by total spend""}")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{message: top 5 suppliers by total spend}')
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k!=''''reply''''}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""message"": ""top 5 suppliers by total spend""}" -o C:/tmp/resp2.json)
